name: Shifting Labyrinth
brief: Escape a tomb complex while its route shifts around the kill team.
objective: Get at least half of the player operatives to escape.

startingNpos.deployment: Wholly within Player B territory, spread evenly with intervening terrain in control range when viewed from Player A's drop zone.

rules.name: Escape
rules.summary: Place an Escape marker at the centre of Player B's killzone edge. Player operatives within 1 inch can move over that edge and escape.

rules.name: Auspex Calibration
rules.timing: Strategic Gambit in each Turning Point after the first, if no operatives have escaped
rules.summary: Roll D3: move the Escape marker D3+3 inches left on 1, do not move it on 2, or D3+3 inches right on 3.

victory.win: When all player operatives have left the killzone, at least half escaped.
victory.lose: When all player operatives have left the killzone and fewer than half escaped.

setupChecks.label: Arrange the killzone as shown on the Mission 1 map and identify the Player A drop zone and Player B territory.
Place the Escape marker at the centre of Player B’s killzone edge.
Generate 2D3+3 starting NPOs and set each up wholly within Player B territory, spread evenly, with intervening terrain within its control range when viewed from Player A’s drop zone.
Give every starting NPO a Conceal order.
Start with 2CP total and select up to four equipment options, recording and managing both for tabletop play; the Guide does not track or validate their effects.
